default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, workflow, and next steps for SEO-driven content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposed a workflow for content creation, starting with 3 pieces/week, ramping to 5 by end of Jan, potentially 10/week later](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Agreed to focus on one calibration article (ETL vs ELT) for review by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Need to establish tracking and analytics process for content performance](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Many proposed topics are too broad; need to break down into more focused pieces](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow and Scaling

  - [Proposed workflow: Update Airtable with topics on Thursdays, deliver articles following Friday](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Initial goal: 3 pieces/week, ramping to 5 by end of January](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Long-term potential: Scale to 10 articles/week, depending on quality and workload](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Matt emphasized focus on effective, resonating content over quantity](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Prophecy lacks automation for publishing and organic tracking](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [GrowthX can provide traffic insights from Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Need to set up conversion tracking in Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Prophecy to determine internal lead for analytics setup](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Keyword Research Process

  - [GrowthX uses combination of Google search data and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Keywords grouped into topics, prioritizing high-traffic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Process involves constant refinement from broad clusters to specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

### Content Topics and Approach

  - [Agreed on "Unlocking the Power of ELT: A Guide to Transforming Your Data Pipeline" as first calibration article](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Focus on educational, high-level content that's product-adjacent](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Aim to create informational pieces that reference Prophecy's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Many proposed topics (e.g., "Mastering Data Pipelines") deemed too broad; need breaking down](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)

### SME Involvement

  - [Identified potential for SME-driven articles on complex topics](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)
  - [Consider breaking down broad topics into series, potentially creating ebooks](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)

### Keyword Difficulty

  - [GrowthX to surface keyword difficulty scores for proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=2109.0)
  - [Helps team understand attainability of ranking for specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to break down broader topics into more focused pieces](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
  - [Deliver calibration article on ETL vs ELT by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare status update for Wednesday's team meeting](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)
  - [Prophecy to start discussions on analytics and tracking setup](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
  - [Consider ways to incorporate SMEs for more in-depth content creation](https://fathom.video/share/dL2SzXRaUT_xst-vmpzJzTxhBtKhNJia?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)

Deliver calibration article on "Unlocking the ETL vs ELT Difference" by Thursday
